lessons.title: Actus Reus — Core Principles, Voluntariness, and Omissions
lessons.description: We're in Module 2 now — Actus Reus — and this is where the building blocks of criminal liability really come together. You cannot commit a crime without both an actus reus and a mens rea.

lessons.title: Causation
lessons.description: There are two stages of causation that you must work through in sequence: factual causation, and then legal causation.
